summary: SPK RC 34 chuan hoa lifecycle native: bat worker inline mac dinh trong script package va dong bo voi FFmpeg runtime moi.
changes: Script start-stop-status cua SPK gio export WORKER_INLINE=1 mac dinh, nen package native luon spawn worker inline sau khi API boot.
Dong bo script package voi logic FFmpeg usable moi, tranh tinh trang ban SPK moi nhung lifecycle van dung script RC cu tren NAS.
Release note nay danh dau moc de cai lai SPK native ma khong can sua tay file /var/packages/coopeditor/scripts/start-stop-status.
